inputMetrics: baseline checksum verified; route selected; no live PR mining
processContract: Bind the job to certified authority and select route/scope without LLM calls.
outputMetrics: schema_valid=true; route rationale present; SLA <= 20s
dirtyDataRules: missing authority proof; baseline checksum mismatch
notes: Contract active; fixture certification still pending.

processName: Story Seeds and Full Context Story Ledger
supplier: Phase 0 authority proof plus manuscript text
inputMetrics: seed output >= 500 words; 9 ledger layers attempted; 13 criteria scaffolded
processContract: Produce provisional story map, evaluation seed, and full-context story ledger.
outputMetrics: all 9 story layers present; seed_authority=seed_only; schema_valid=true
dirtyDataRules: malformed seed JSON; missing story ledger layer; unverified seed claims
notes: Cartel Babies used fallback seeds; robustness remains a gap.

supplier: Phase 0 authority proof plus manuscript and criteria canon
inputMetrics: evidence anchors available; candidate prose contract loaded
processContract: Produce provisional revise opportunities with A/B/C candidate prose.
outputRequiredFields: opportunity_id; criterion_key; evidence; candidate_a; candidate_b; candidate_c
outputMetrics: all opportunities evidence-anchored; A/B/C are manuscript-ready prose
dirtyDataRules: generic opportunity; missing evidence anchor; A/B/C not prose
notes: Seed enriches Revise but evaluation evidence governs.

inputMetrics: seed schemas valid; required seed sections present
processContract: Block Phase 1A when seed artifacts are incomplete.
outputMetrics: missing sections detected; blocked/passed classified
dirtyDataRules: missing seed section; schema invalid
notes: Dirty seeds must kick back, not quietly degrade downstream.

inputMetrics: auth present; required fields complete; canonical job_type
processContract: Validate request and accept canonical job payload for queueing.
outputMetrics: ok=true response; trace id emitted
dirtyDataRules: ambiguous manuscript source; unauthenticated actor; non-canonical job type
notes: Need fuller input metrics for doc type, language, and mode.

inputMetrics: canonical status set only; DB write success
processContract: Persist queued job with canonical state and progress keys.
outputMetrics: status=queued; progress keys present
dirtyDataRules: non-canonical status; illegal transition
notes: JobStatus must remain queued|running|complete|failed only.

inputMetrics: single atomic claimant; worker_pulse_at set at claim time
processContract: Claim one eligible queued job with lease and heartbeat protection.
outputMetrics: exactly one active lease; split-brain prevented
dirtyDataRules: null worker_pulse_at; overlapping lease; non-production worker id
notes: Claim RPC migration addressed split-brain null pulse.

inputMetrics: text normalized; chunk strategy selected; non-empty chunk set
processContract: Create deterministic chunk/routing manifest for pass execution.
outputMetrics: stable boundaries; no hidden fallback path
dirtyDataRules: empty chunks for non-empty manuscript; route/type mismatch
notes: Short-form single-chunk synthesis recently fixed; keep route metrics explicit.

inputMetrics: timeout budget set; pass runner invoked
processContract: Extract story/craft signals without depending on Pass 2 output.
outputMetrics: parseable output; entity contamination rejected; ledger names canonical
dirtyDataRules: pseudo-entity contamination; malformed pass output; missing story layer
notes: Story ledger is truth for canonical names unless evidence proves otherwise.

inputMetrics: all visible layers classified; dirty layers suppressed/degraded
processContract: Classify story layers and block genuine benchmark failures.
outputMetrics: hard-fail triage complete; invalid hard-fails not promoted
dirtyDataRules: abandoned characters; canonical identity degraded; failed benchmark minimum
notes: Cartel Babies repair_required kicked forward; backward kick policy must be hardened later.

inputMetrics: all visible layers reviewed; comments for correction/reject
processContract: Persist accepted story ledger or route dirty layers back for repair.
outputMetrics: all visible layers have decisions; failed layers excluded
dirtyDataRules: auto-accepted degraded ledger; review gate bypassed on long-form hard fail
notes: Accepted ledger must be built through storyLedgerApprovalNormalizer.

inputMetrics: no Pass 1 payload as input; independence guard active
processContract: Produce independent craft diagnosis and candidate recommendations.
outputMetrics: output parseable; lexical independence passes
dirtyDataRules: Pass 1 contamination; generic recommendations; malformed output
notes: Independence is mandatory.

inputMetrics: no scaffold residue; complete sentences; evidence anchors present
processContract: Certify Pass 1/2 payload before synthesis receives it.
outputMetrics: all prose checks pass; source-aware kick owner recorded
backwardKick: S05_PASS1 or S06_PASS2 based on source defect
dirtyDataRules: scaffold residue; broken modal; generic language; missing evidence anchor
notes: Highest-risk seam defense.

inputMetrics: upstream passes succeeded; convergence input consistency
processContract: Synthesize final evaluation while preserving evidence, specificity, score hierarchy, and ledger name authority.
outputMetrics: no generic recommendations; banned names absent; score-10 rec suppression
dirtyDataRules: missing overview field; banned character name; generic prescription; duplicate strategic lever
notes: No malformed or generic recommendation may reach author-facing output.

inputMetrics: canonical criterion keys preserved; score/null semantics preserved
processContract: Normalize synthesis into canonical evaluation_result_v2.
outputMetrics: 13 criteria coherent; score range valid; entity contamination rejected
dirtyDataRules: missing criterion; score range invalid; banned entity contamination; field undefined where required
consumers: S09_QUALITYGATEV2; S11a_RENDERER_WEBPAGE; S11b_DOWNLOAD_PIPELINE; ADJACENT_WAVE; ADJACENT_DREAM; ADJACENT_REVISION_LEDGER
notes: This is the canonical evaluation payload; no renderer may bypass it.

inputMetrics: deterministic checks executed; gate decision available
processContract: Fail closed on deterministic evaluation defects.
outputMetrics: failed checks emitted; no bypass by confidence
backwardKick: S07_PASS3 or S08_ER2_NORMALIZATION based on defect
dirtyDataRules: duplicate rec; generic rec; low evidence coverage; criteria mismatch
notes: Detection without enforcement is a defect.

inputMetrics: no persist if gate fails; atomic RPC available
processContract: Persist canonical evaluation artifact and terminal job state atomically.
outputMetrics: artifact ID returned; terminal status canonical
dirtyDataRules: gate failed but persist attempted; artifact validation failed
notes: No artifact persists after failed deterministic gate.

inputMetrics: 13 criteria present; at least one score <= 9 for non-empty derivation
processContract: Derive manuscript-specific wave plan from canonical criterion keys with score-aware filtering.
outputMetrics: derived_wave_ids non-empty when findings exist; no generic fallback when bridge applies
dirtyDataRules: NO_DERIVED_WAVES_FROM_PASS3_FINDINGS; generic fallback only
notes: PR #1108 fixed criterion bridge; registry preserves acceptance metrics.

processName: Gate 15, Golden Spine, Dialogue Canon, Revision Canon Metadata
inputMetrics: text non-empty; criteria keys extractable; word count known
processContract: Run manuscript-scale governance audits and persist all governance artifacts.
outputMetrics: Gate 15 status determined; dialogue count proportional; golden spine surfaced
dirtyDataRules: Gate 15 FAIL; dialogue detector impossible count; weak continuity hidden
notes: Cartel Babies proved detector and enforcement gaps.

inputArtifacts: evaluation_result_v2; phase1a_chunk_routing_manifest_v1; wave_revision_plan_v1; gate_15_audit_v1; golden_spine_v1; dialogue_canon_audit_v1
inputMetrics: evaluation_result_v2 present; chunks loadable; no existing longform_document_v1
processContract: Produce long-form narrative synthesis without diverging from canonical evaluation data.
outputMetrics: non-empty document; canonical score/genre parity; no banned-name contamination
dirtyDataRules: DREAM score drift; DREAM genre drift; banned name contamination; score-10 shopping list
notes: DREAM may enrich, but it must not become a competing evaluation source.

inputArtifacts: evaluation_result_v2; longform_document_v1; wave_revision_plan_v1; gate_15_audit_v1; golden_spine_v1; dialogue_canon_audit_v1; revision_canon_metadata_v1
inputMetrics: DREAM persisted before audit; hard-required artifacts present
processContract: Determine last-mile releasability from complete artifact set.
outputMetrics: verdict PASS/WARN for releasable reports; missing_required_artifacts empty
dirtyDataRules: BLOCK verdict; missing DREAM; contradiction detected; low coverage
notes: PR #1109 fixed false BLOCK; BLOCK enforcement remains pending.

supplier: Canonical evaluation artifact, active evaluation template contract, audits, and renderer manifest
inputArtifacts: evaluation_result_v2; evaluation_template_contract_v1; final_external_audit_v1; gate_15_audit_v1; dialogue_canon_audit_v1; wave_revision_plan_v1; longform_document_v1
inputMetrics: all required artifacts present; active template path known; no blocking verdicts; renderer parity check complete
processContract: Build and certify UnifiedEvaluationDocument against the active evaluation template before any author-visible renderer may expose it.
outputRequiredFields: active_template_path; unified_document_hash; decision; parity_results; blocking_reasons; certified_at
outputMetrics: template contract satisfied; score parity; genre parity; criteria parity; banned names=0; WAVE non-generic
backwardKick: producer stage named by failed check
dirtyDataRules: webpage/download mismatch; banned entity; Gate 15 FAIL; Final Audit BLOCK; dialogue detector impossible
failureCodes: PHASE5_TEMPLATE_CONTRACT_FAIL; PHASE5_RENDER_PARITY_FAIL; PHASE5_BANNED_ENTITY; PHASE5_SCORE_DRIFT; PHASE5_MISSING_AUDIT; PHASE5_UNCERTIFIED_OUTPUT
notes: Planned required gate; registry captures the missing stage explicitly. Long-form-only inputs (final_external_audit_v1, gate_15_audit_v1, dialogue_canon_audit_v1, wave_revision_plan_v1, longform_document_v1) are required only when applicable by evaluation mode.

inputMetrics: ownership/auth check; Phase 5 pass; no local recalculation
processContract: Render webpage from UnifiedEvaluationDocument only.
outputMetrics: matches PDF/DOCX/TXT fields; no fabricated progress
dirtyDataRules: report type drift; score drift; genre drift; criteria confidence drift
notes: PR #1113 should refactor webpage to consume UnifiedEvaluationDocument.

inputMetrics: format supported; download parity passes
processContract: Render PDF/DOCX/TXT from the same canonical document as webpage.
outputMetrics: evidence byte-for-byte preserved; format render succeeds; parity with webpage
dirtyDataRules: sanitizer mutates evidence; download parity fail; format render fail
notes: Downloads are closer to unified model than webpage but still require Phase 5 certification.

inputMetrics: evidence coverage 100%; all opportunities traceable
processContract: Build evidence-backed opportunities for Revise without rerunning evaluation.
outputRequiredFields: opportunity_id; finding_id; criterion; severity; evidence_anchor; revision_operation
outputMetrics: no opportunity without evidence; Ready vs Needs Targeting classified
dirtyDataRules: empty ledger; missing evidence anchor; vague operation
notes: No evaluation evidence equals no Revise Queue item.

supplier: Revision opportunity ledger plus optional revise seed
inputMetrics: ledger non-empty; A/B/C are prose when Ready
processContract: Admit evidence-backed revision items into the authenticated workbench.
outputMetrics: Ready and Needs Targeting not mixed; author decisions persisted
dirtyDataRules: Revise reruns evaluator; A/B/C not prose; author decision not persisted
notes: Revise is a consume-and-repair surface, not a second evaluator.
